name: Kandi Pachadi
steps: Dry roast the toor dal on low heat until golden and nutty; set aside.
Roast the red chillies and cumin in a spoon of oil.
Grind the dal coarsely first, then add chillies, cumin, garlic, tamarind and salt.
Grind again with a splash of water to a thick, coarse pachadi.
Serve with hot rice and a big spoon of ghee — Telangana's protein-packed everyday chutney.
